title: Natori Association

'''Natori Association''' was one of companies that were part of the [[Tenloss Syndicate/Legends|Tenloss Syndicate]] and operated as a training and supply company. It was based on the planet [[Sperin]] in the [[Palaquin system]].<ref name="GG11" />

The organization started as a [[mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] training organization teaching combat skills mainly to [[alien/Legends|non-humans]]. The training philosophy of the Natori was to use particular [[Species/Legends|species]]' natural physical, mental, and cultural abilities to their advantage. For instance [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] were deployed as forest fighters while [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] were trained for space combat.<ref name="J15">{{JournalCite|15|Special Military Unit Intelligence Update}}</ref> Training was rough, and failures were washed-out.<ref name="guide" />

The Natori had a long term security contract with [[Ororo Transportation/Legends|Ororo Transportation]] but since the two organizations were controlled by the Tenloss Syndicate this amounted to money laundering.<ref name="guide" />

In order to keep a low profile towards the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Natori did not involve with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], and did not confront the Empire directly; even so, its non-human strength, brought some suspicion to the [[Humanocentrism|humanocentric]] Empire.<ref name="guide" />

[[Malakin Enterprises]], also part of the Tenloss Syndicate, was the largest stockholder in the Natori Association.<ref name="J15" />

[[File:NatoriAssociationVergessoBase-SotEPlanetsGuide.png|thumb|Natori Association patrol at Vergesso Base]]

Natori used [[Vergesso Base]] (a [[shadowport/Legends|shadowport]] controlled by Ororo) as local headquarters organizing transportations, and mustering point; a branch office was located in [[The Life]] level of the Base. A [[Battalion/Legends|battalion]] of [[Natori Shock Troops|shock troopers]] under [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Vam Margan]], were used for internal security and, in case of an intrusion, base defense. They rotated shifts by [[Company/Legends|company]] and were typically deployed in [[Squad/Legends|squads]] of ten soldiers, as patrols or guards; they occasionally aided port officials with manual tasks.<ref name="guide" />

{{Company-stub}}
